values.value: Clinical Trial - Bisphosphonates As Adjuvant Therapy

payload.description: Contains longitudinal records of medical interventions for cancer patients, including chemotherapy cycles, hormone therapy, radiation dosages, and clinical trial participation details.
Unique identifier for the patient, typically following TCGA barcode format.
The date or relative day count when the specific treatment began.
The date or relative day count when the specific treatment ended.
General classification of the timeline entry.
Broad category of the oncological therapy administered.
Specific sub-classification of the treatment strategy or trial phase.
The specific drug or radiation name administered to the patient.
The total number of repetitive treatment rounds administered.
The amount of drug intended to be given per administration.
The measurement unit for the prescribed dose.
Numerical sequence of the therapy regimen.
Clinical reason or stage for which the treatment was prescribed.
Evaluation of how the tumor responded to the treatment.
Classification of investigational drugs within a clinical trial context.
The path by which the drug is brought into contact with the body.
Indicates if the therapy was still being administered at the time of reporting.
Total amount of the drug delivered over the entire treatment course.
Unit of measurement for the cumulative dose.
Whether the treatment was part of a registered clinical research trial.
Location on/in the body where treatment was targeted, primarily for radiation.
Sequence number of the radiation treatment course.
Number of times the total radiation dose was divided into individual treatments.
Total amount of radiation energy delivered to the tissue.
Indicates if radiation courses are currently active.
Method or mechanism by which radiation was delivered.
Supplemental free-text information about the radiation procedure.
Unit of measurement for ionizing radiation dose.

payload.value: NAACR (North American Association of Central Cancer Registries)
NAACCR (North American Association of Central Cancer Registries)
